name: browser_automation
author: openclaw
description: Automates web browser tasks using the Browser Agent Taskmaster engine. Send a natural-language goal and the agent will plan, navigate, click, type, and verify in a real browser.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: The high-level goal to accomplish in the browser (e.g. 'Go to YouTube and search for OpenClaw')

examples: Go to YouTube and search for 'machine learning tutorials'
Open Wikipedia and find the page about Python programming
Navigate to Google Maps and search for restaurants near me
